svg.title: A197 ChaCha10 width-12 complete-partition refinement boundary
svg.desc: A 16-by-16 map of all 256 width-12 cells in the complete round-10 refinement; every bounded result is UNKNOWN and no model is returned.
svg.text: Same still-secret ChaCha10 challenge · 256 disjoint 2¹² cells · 64 numeric waves × 4 workers
high-prefix byte: row nibble × column nibble
Finer complete partition, same bounded status boundary: UNKNOWN is not UNSAT.
The refinement makes no absence, recovery, or uniqueness claim; all 256 cells execute without early stop.
